hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$json = $input | Out-String; $json | Out-File -FilePath $env:USERPROFILE/.claude/stop-hook-debug.json -Force; $project = Split-Path -Leaf (Get-Location); New-BurntToastNotification -Text \"$project\", \"debug dump saved\" -Sound 'IM' -UniqueIdentifier 'claude-code'"
